data.title: Huawei Launches AI Data Platform to Bridge Models and Business Value
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on March 5, 2026, the Huawei Product & Solution Launch event at MWC Barcelona saw Yuan Yuan, President of Huawei Data Storage Product Line, unveil Huawei's AI Data Platform. This platform combines knowledge generation technologies and was officially introduced during the event.

data.title: Pan American Silver Discovers New High-Grade Veins at the La Colorada Mine
data.description: Pan American Silver Corp revealed recent drill findings from the southeastern and eastern sections of the La Colorada mine in Zacatecas, Mexico. The exploration efforts between the Cristina and San Gerónimo systems uncovered a minimum of four new veins along with replacement mineralization connected to contacts. The discoveries showcased broad mineralized intercepts containing substantial amounts of silver, gold, and other minerals. This update was reported by Pan American Silver Corp, a leading mining company with listings on NYSE as PAAS and TSX as PAAS.

data.title: Insights into Shattuck Labs Q4 Earnings
data.description: Shattuck Labs (STTK) recently disclosed its Q4 earnings on March 5, 2026, at 06:15 AM. Key takeaways from the report reveal a positive outcome for the company. In terms of earnings, Shattuck Labs outperformed expectations by 7.69%, posting an EPS of $-0.12 compared to the projected $-0.13. Revenue remained stagnant compared to the corresponding period last year, with no increase or decrease observed. In the past, the company has consistently surpassed analyst predictions for earnings. For further details, the entire story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Shattuck Labs Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results and Recent Business Highlights
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Shattuck Labs, Inc. (NASDAQ: STTK), operating in Austin, Texas and Durham, N.C., released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The pioneering clinical-stage biotech company specializes in creating groundbreaking monoclonal and bispecific DR3 blocking antibodies to aid patients battling inflammatory and immune-mediated illnesses. The report also encompassed recent business achievements made by the Company.

data.title: Reform UK receives £3 million ($4 million) donation from Thai crypto investor Christopher Harborne - reports.
data.description: Reform UK, led by Nigel Farage, has received a significant financial injection of £3 million (approximately $4 million) from Christopher Harborne, a crypto investor based in Thailand. This additional funding marks a second major contribution for the party.

data.title: EPAM Enters Into $300 Million Accelerated Share Repurchase Agreement
data.description: Today in Newtown, Pennsylvania, EPAM Systems, Inc., a prominent company in digital and AI transformation, revealed its initiation of an accelerated share repurchase agreement with Morgan Stanley & Co. LLC. The agreement entails the repurchase of a total of $300 million worth of shares.

data.title: PPC Group and METLEN Energy & Metals join forces to develop up to 1,500MW of energy storage projects across three countries
data.description: Two energy storage projects are set to be implemented in Romania, Bulgaria, and Italy, with a combined total nominal capacity of 1,500 MW and 3,000 MWh. These projects will utilize two-hour liquid-cooled battery systems that incorporate innovative LFP technology. The collaboration between the two parties involved brings expertise in development, construction, and energy management for the storage systems.
